steps.title: Find the taxed cost
steps.content:
A $6\%$ tax means the school pays $106\%$ of the tablet price:
$$180(1.06)=190.80$$

steps.title: Divide the budget
steps.content:
Use the budget to find the greatest possible number of tablets:
$$\frac{3{,}600}{190.80}=18.87$$

steps.title: Use a whole number
steps.content: The school cannot order part of a tablet, so round down to $18$. The answer is 18.
